result.stdout:
USAGE:
    sm [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    new       Create new projects, modules, or features 
    doctor    Validate project structure and conventions

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Validate project structure and conventions

USAGE:
    sm doctor [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information                             
        --fix     Auto-fix missing slnx entries and project references

commands.payload:

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Create new projects, modules, or features

USAGE:
    sm new [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    project    Scaffold a new SimpleModule solution
    module     Scaffold a new module               
    feature    Add a feature to an existing module

commands.payload:
DESCRIPTION:
Create new projects, modules, or features

USAGE:
    sm new [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    project    Scaffold a new SimpleModule solution
    module     Scaffold a new module               
    feature    Add a feature to an existing module

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Add a feature to an existing module

USAGE:
    sm new feature [name] [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    [name]    Feature name in PascalCase (e.g. UpdateInvoice)

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help         Prints help information                                  
    -m, --module       Target module name                                       
        --method       HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)                     
    -r, --route        Route pattern (e.g. /{id})                               
        --validator    Include a validator class                                
        --no-view      Skip creating the React view component and Pages/index.ts
                       entry                                                    
        --dry-run      Show what would be created without writing any files

commands.payload:
DESCRIPTION:
Add a feature to an existing module

USAGE:
    sm new feature [name] [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    [name]    Feature name in PascalCase (e.g. UpdateInvoice)

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help         Prints help information                                  
    -m, --module       Target module name                                       
        --method       HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)                     
    -r, --route        Route pattern (e.g. /{id})                               
        --validator    Include a validator class                                
        --no-view      Skip creating the React view component and Pages/index.ts
                       entry                                                    
        --dry-run      Show what would be created without writing any files

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Scaffold a new module

USAGE:
    sm new module [name] [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    [name]    Module name in PascalCase (e.g. Invoices)

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information                             
        --dry-run    Show what would be created without writing any files

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Scaffold a new SimpleModule solution

USAGE:
    sm new project [name] [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    [name]    Project name in PascalCase (e.g. MyApp)

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information                             
    -o, --output     Output directory (defaults to current directory)    
        --dry-run    Show what would be created without writing any files
